scripts.build: npm run build:design-tokens && npm run build:components
scripts.build:demo: npm run build:icons && ng build sc-demo --configuration production --output-path dist/sc-demo
scripts.build:supervisor: npm run build && ng build supervisor --configuration production
scripts.start:supervisor: npm run build && ng serve supervisor
scripts.build:agent: npm run build && ng build agent --configuration production
scripts.start:agent: npm run build && ng serve agent
scripts.build:icons: npm run generate:icons && ng build ui-smartcontact-icons
scripts.build:components: npm run build:icons && ng build ui-smartcontact
scripts.export:design-tokens: npm run build:design-tokens && node scripts/export-package.mjs design-tokens
scripts.export:icons: npm run build:icons && node scripts/export-package.mjs ui-smartcontact-icons
scripts.export:components: npm run build:components && node scripts/export-package.mjs ui-smartcontact
scripts.export:all: npm run build && node scripts/export-package.mjs design-tokens ui-smartcontact-icons ui-smartcontact
scripts.tokens:import: node scripts/token-gen.mjs --write && node scripts/token-gen-component.mjs --write && node scripts/token-gen-color.mjs --write && node scripts/token-gen-cmp-color.mjs --write && node scripts/token-gen-effects.mjs --write
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --sourceMap -p projects/ui-smartcontact/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc --noEmit --sourceMap -p projects/ui-smartcontact-icons/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc --noEmit -p projects/sc-demo/tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p projects/supervisor/tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p projects/agent/tsconfig.app.json
scripts.verify: npm run tokens:export-clean && npm run tokens:gen && npm run tokens:gen-component && npm run tokens:gen-color && npm run tokens:gen-cmp-color && npm run tokens:gen-effects && npm run tokens:parity && npm run tokens:guard && npm run tokens:cmp-rewire && npm run tokens:effects-rewire && npm run tokens:type-parity && npm run audit:theme-scale && npm run audit:components && npm run usage:check && npm run i18n:check && npm run test:unit && npm run docs:guard && npm run docs:coherence && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
